organization_type.description: Free-text legal form of the entity (e.g., 'Limited Partnership', 'Limited Liability Company'). Distinct from form-id metadata; populated when the entity itself recites its type on the form. NEW with MLPA-Conv — anticipated reuse on other recital forms.

governing_statute_jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction whose statute governs the entity (e.g., 'Maine'). Distinct from entity.home_jurisdiction (foreign-qualification flavor) — this key is unscoped and applies when the form recites the governing law explicitly even if domestic.

formation_date.description: Date the entity was originally formed under its governing statute. Unscoped — distinct from entity.formation_date_in_home_jurisdiction (foreign-qualification flavor).

governing_statute_jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction whose organic statute governs the post-conversion (resulting) entity. Sub-key under conversion.new_entity.*.

formation_date.description: Date the resulting entity was/will be formed under its governing statute. Sub-key under conversion.new_entity.*.

physical_address.description: Single-line physical address of the post-conversion entity's principal office. Sub-key under conversion.new_entity.*.

line1.description: First line of §1435 service-of-process mailing address for a foreign resulting entity not authorized to transact business in Maine. Required only when the resulting entity is foreign AND unauthorized; SOS becomes agent for service of process by appointment.

line2.description: Second/continuation line of the §1435 service-of-process address.

effective_date.description: REQUIRED effective date of conversion under the resulting entity's governing statute. Distinct from conversion.future_effective_date (MBCA-21's optional override). On forms where the effective date is determined by the surviving entity's organic law, this key applies.

new_entity_organizing_document_exhibit_l.description: Inline exhibit letter referencing the FULL organizing document of the resulting entity, attached as part hereof (per SEVENTH option 1). Distinct from MBCA-21's conversion.new_entity_provisions_exhibit_letter, which references only the required-provisions subset.

result_type.description: Whether the resulting entity requires a SOS filing. Enum: 'filing_required' (organizing-document exhibit attached) | 'no_filing_required' (e.g., general partnership, sole prop).

printed_name_and_capacity.description: Per-GP signer block applied in non-formation contexts (e.g., LP-conversion). Extends the per-officer-signer-pattern (`general_partner_N.*` from MLPA-6 formation) to forms where every GP must sign on behalf of an existing LP. Shape-D primitive (combined name+capacity) applied per GP. Distinct from filing.signer.* because the LP requires ALL GPs to sign, not just one authorized representative.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
